efficiency of the detector was measured using the known
intensity ratios of the radiations from an 241Am
source. The x-ray and gamma-ray radiation with energies
of 13.9, 26.2, and 59.5 keV were employed. The absolute
efficiency of the detector was obtained by normalizing
the relative data to 100% at 59.5 keV after correction
for absorption in the Be entrance window.
